name: financial-budget-builder
description: AI-Powered Financial Budget Builder — Full Stack

scripts.dev: npx concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.install:all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../frontend && npm run build
scripts.prisma:migrate: cd backend && npx prisma migrate dev
